About Qasim Shaikh

Qasim Shaikh is a passionate digital marketing expert and AI automation specialist based in Yavatmal, Maharashtra. He is the founder of FutureTech AI — Yavatmal's first and leading AI-powered digital marketing agency.

With over 2 years of experience in digital marketing and AI automation, Qasim has worked with businesses across Yavatmal district, Vidarbha, and even international clients in the UAE and UK — delivering measurable growth through smart, technology-driven strategies.

Education & Certifications

  • 🏛️ IIM Bangalore — Digital Marketing Certification (SWAYAM MOOC, July 2024 Semester, Score: 75.5%)
  • 🎓 MBA (Pursuing) — Business Management with Marketing Specialization
  • 🤖 AI Tools & Prompt Engineering — Certified in modern AI applications
  • 📈 Performance Marketing — Facebook Ads, Google Ads, Analytics

Skills & Expertise

  • AI Chatbots (WhatsApp & Web) — Building conversational AI for businesses
  • Marketing Automation — Lead funnels, email sequences, CRM integration
  • Search Engine Optimization (SEO) — Local and national Google ranking
  • Facebook & Instagram Advertising — Lead generation and brand awareness
  • Social Media Marketing — Marathi & Hindi content for regional audiences
  • Website Development — Fast, SEO-ready websites for local businesses
  • Business Strategy — MBA-level growth consulting for SMEs

Mission: Grow Local Businesses with AI

Qasim's mission is simple: help every local business in Yavatmal district compete and win in the digital world — using the same AI and marketing tools that large companies use, but made affordable and accessible for small businesses.

"I grew up in Yavatmal and I see incredible businesses here that deserve more customers. AI and digital marketing can give them that edge — and that's exactly what FutureTech AI is built to do." — Qasim Shaikh
